hooks.command: echo "FIRE $(date)" >> .claude/reviews/hook-debug.log; STDIN=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1); echo "CMD=[$COMMAND]" >> .claude/reviews/hook-debug.log; if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then { echo "--- $(date) ---"; echo "Triggered by commit"; bash .claude/hooks/run_review.sh < /dev/null; echo "exit: $?"; } >> .claude/reviews/hook-debug.log 2>&1; fi
STDIN=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bash .claude/hooks/update_manifest.sh < /dev/null; fi
STDIN=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bash .claude/hooks/update_tracker.sh < /dev/null; fi
STDIN=$(cat); COMMAND=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>&1); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -q 'git commit'; then bash .claude/hooks/update_deviations.sh < /dev/null; fi
